title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: Get up and running with Llama 3.2, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for Ollama; chat, embed, generate completions with local models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Deno, Bun and browsers (via proxy).

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain community integration to use Ollama models for chat, embeddings, and tool-calling.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI); supports RAG, multimodal, admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; fluent builder API, supports streaming and embeddings.

title: ollama-cli
summary: A friendlier interactive CLI wrapper around ollama commands with autocomplete and syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Lightweight local GitHub Copilot replacement using Ollama models inside VS Code.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Template repo to build a RAG pipeline with Ollama + LangChain + Chroma in Docker.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama functions to Claude Desktop and other MCP clients.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to generate, refactor and chat with Ollama models without leaving the editor.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama server on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and autoscaling.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Cross-platform desktop GUI for Ollama built with Tauri + React; supports multiple concurrent chats.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-sdks
summary: Meta-repo tracking community-built SDKs for Rust, Go, C#, Swift and more.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models and switch personalities.

title: ollama-dagster
summary: Dagster assets & resources for batch-generating embeddings or completions with Ollama in data pipelines.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat component template that connects to Ollama with session memory and RAG toggle.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust client for Ollama using reqwest; supports generate, chat, create, pull and embeddings APIs.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 8 library and CLI for Ollama with DI-friendly client and source-generated JSON handling.
